title: PlayerReviveFabric
description: lets players revive fallen teammates before they die completely. Perfect for survival servers, adventures, and SMPs where teamwork matters more than losing everything to an unexpected death.
body:
# ❤️ PlayerReviveFabric ### **Death is not the end. Someone can still bring you back.** **PlayerReviveFabric** adds a clean, immersive **downed & revive system** to Minecraft Fabric servers. Instead of instantly dying, players fall into a critical state where **any nearby player** can rush in and revive them before the timer runs out.
![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-Fabric-00FFFF?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=0b0f14) ![Revive](https://img.shields.io/badge/System-Player%20Revive-00FFFF?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=0b0f14) ![TNTStudios](https://img.shields.io/badge/By-TNTStudios-00FFFF?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=0b0f14)
**Built for SMPs, survival events, roleplay servers, boss fights, creator servers, adventure maps, and multiplayer modpacks.**
--- ## 🌟 Why This Mod Makes Multiplayer Better Minecraft deaths can be brutal. One creeper. One bad jump. One boss hit. One chaotic event where half the server drops in seconds. Normally, that moment ends instantly. With **PlayerReviveFabric**, it becomes a moment players actually remember. A player goes down. The timer starts. Someone nearby has to decide: > **Do I run away... or do I risk it and save them?** That tiny decision creates panic, clutch saves, funny screams in voice chat, and the kind of multiplayer moments that make servers feel alive. --- ## 🎬 What It Adds ### 🩸 Downed State Instead of Instant Death When a player takes lethal damage, they enter a **downed state** instead of dying immediately. They are not safe, but they are not gone yet. The revive timer starts, and now every second matters. --- ### ⏳ Configurable Revive Timer Downed players only have a limited amount of time before they die normally. Server owners can adjust the timer to match the experience they want: - More forgiving for casual SMPs - More intense for hardcore-style servers - Balanced for boss fights and events - Faster-paced for minigames - More dramatic for roleplay servers --- ### 🤝 Anyone Can Revive Any nearby player can interact with a downed player to begin reviving them. No confusing team restrictions. No complicated setup. No weird permissions for normal gameplay. Just get close, interact, and bring them back before it is too late. --- ### 💬 Critical State Chat Downed players can still communicate using the revive screen. They can: - Ask for help - Share coordinates - Warn others about danger - Tell someone to hurry up - Panic dramatically while everyone watches the timer drop Because yes, screaming **"I'M DOWN, HELP!"** is part of the experience. --- ### 🎨 Immersive UI PlayerReviveFabric includes a custom downed screen and revive progress feedback. The goal is simple: > Make the revive system feel like it belongs in Minecraft multiplayer, not like a random command added on top. --- ### 🌐 Multilanguage Support Included languages: - 🇺🇸 English - 🇪🇸 Spanish - Spain - 🇲🇽 Spanish - Mexico --- ## 🔥 Moments This Mod Creates PlayerReviveFabric is built for the kind of moments people talk about after the session ends. ### 🧟 Zombie Apocalypse Servers A player gets surrounded. Someone has to push through the horde and revive them before it is too late. ### 🐉 Boss Fights The boss knocks multiple players down. People start reviving each other while trying not to get deleted too. ### 🎥 Creator SMPs More panic. More reactions. More dramatic saves. More clips. ### 🏰 Factions & War Events A player drops during a fight. Reviving them could turn the battle around. ### 💀 Hardcore-Inspired Servers Death still matters, but players get one last chance if someone reaches them in time. ### 🗺️ Adventure Maps & Modpacks Adds tension to exploration, dungeons, combat encounters, and cooperative progression. --- ## 🛠️ How It Works ### 1. A Player Goes Down When a player receives lethal damage, they enter the **downed state**. They are not dead yet, but the timer is ticking. --- ### 2. Someone Tries to Help Any nearby player can reach the downed player and start the revive interaction. --- ### 3. The Revive Begins Both players receive clear progress feedback while the revive is happening. If the revive completes, the downed player gets back up. --- ### 4. Back Into the Action After being revived, the player returns with a configurable amount of health. But be careful: > Getting revived does not mean the danger is gone. --- ## ⚙️ Configuration PlayerReviveFabric generates its config file here: ```txt config/playerrevivefabric/revive_config.json ``` | Option | Default | Description | | :--- | :---: | :--- | | `defaultReviveTicks` | `2400` | Total time before a downed player dies. Minecraft runs at 20 ticks per second, so the default value is 2 minutes. | | `reviveHealthPercentage` | `0.5` | Percentage of max health restored after being revived. `0.5` means 50% health. | --- ## 🛡️ Admin & Staff Commands PlayerReviveFabric includes tools for server owners, operators, and event hosts. These commands require **permission level 4**. --- ### 🔄 Reload the Config Apply config changes without restarting the server: ```mcfunction /revivir reload ``` --- ### ⚡ Force Revive a Player Instantly revive a downed player without requiring another player to help: ```mcfunction /revivir ``` Useful for: - Events - Boss fights - Staff-managed minigames - Emergency situations - Fixing chaotic wipes during live gameplay --- ### 🚨 Revive Everyone Bring all players back at once: ```mcfunction /revivir @a ``` Perfect for large events where many players go down and staff needs to recover the session quickly. --- ## 🧩 Recommended For PlayerReviveFabric fits especially well in: - 🌲 Survival SMPs - 🧟 Zombie apocalypse servers - 🎭 Roleplay servers - 🐉 Boss fight events - 🎥 Creator SMPs - 🧪 Multiplayer modpacks - 💀 Hardcore-inspired servers - 🗺️ Adventure maps - ⚔️ PvE/PvP servers - 🏰 Factions and war events If your server has danger, chaos, exploration, or big multiplayer moments, this mod makes those moments better. --- ## ✅ Usage Permissions You are allowed to use **PlayerReviveFabric** on: - Public servers - Private servers - SMPs - Event servers - Creator servers - Modpacks - Multiplayer projects You may use it to improve your Minecraft experience, include it in your server setup, and build gameplay around it. The only big rule is simple: > **Do not modify, decompile, reupload, resell, or claim the mod as your own.** Please use the official Modrinth, CurseForge, GitHub, or TNTStudios download pages when sharing the mod. --- ## ❓ FAQ ### Can any player revive another player? Yes. Any nearby player can revive a downed player. It is not limited to teams or factions. --- ### Does this mod remove death? No. Death still exists. The mod simply adds a **last chance** before the player dies. --- ### Can a player still die normally? Yes. If the revive timer runs out, the player dies normally. --- ### Can downed players choose to die? Yes. Players can accept death instead of waiting. --- ### Can the revive timer be changed? Yes. You can change it in the config file. --- ### Can staff revive players manually? Yes. Operators with permission level `4` can use: ```mcfunction /revivir ``` or: ```mcfunction /revivir @a ``` This is especially useful for events, boss fights, and situations where many players go down at once. --- ### Can I use this mod on my server? Yes. You can use PlayerReviveFabric on your server, including public, private, event, roleplay, SMP, and creator servers. --- ### Can I include it in a modpack? Yes. You can include PlayerReviveFabric in modpacks, as long as the mod is not modified, reuploaded as your own, or redistributed outside official sources. --- ### Can I modify the mod? No. You may use the mod, but you may not modify, decompile, repackage, resell, or claim it as your own. --- ### Will this mod support more Minecraft versions? Yes. Support for more Minecraft versions is planned for future releases. --- ### Should this be installed on both client and server? Yes, for the best experience. The server handles the mechanic, while the client provides the proper UI. --- ## 💎 Why Download It? Because Minecraft multiplayer is better when players get stories like: - “I got revived with half a heart.” - “Everyone was down and staff saved the event.” - “Someone ran through mobs just to revive me.” - “The boss fight was almost over, then the revive clutch happened.” - “We survived only because someone risked everything.” **PlayerReviveFabric** turns death into panic, tension, saves, and unforgettable server moments.
### ❤️ Give your players one last chance. **Download PlayerReviveFabric and make every death feel like a moment.**
--- ## 👤 Developer **PlayerReviveFabric** is developed by **TNTNetta**, developer at **TNTStudios**.
# TNTStudios ### **Your imagination, our creation.** [![Website](https://img.shields.io/badge/Website-TNTStudios.space-00FFFF?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=0b0f14)](https://tntstudios.space/) [![X](https://img.shields.io/badge/X-@TNTNetta-00FFFF?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=0b0f14)](https://x.com/TNTNetta) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-@TNTNetta-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=0b0f14)](https://discord.com/users/TNTNetta) [![TNTStudios Socials](https://img.shields.io/badge/Socials-@TNTStudiosn-00ff99?style=for-the-badge&labelColor=0b0f14)](https://tntstudios.space/)
**Made with ❤️ by TNTStudios** A mod created to make Minecraft multiplayer more intense, cooperative, and unforgettable.
